items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the service menu being displayed on Google, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for the service menu to be displayed, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific aspect. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
